name: Volkswagen AG
description: Volkswagen AG, known as the Volkswagen Group, is a prominent German multinational automotive manufacturer headquartered in Wolfsburg. As one of the world's leading automobile producers, the company manages a diverse portfolio of iconic brands, including Volkswagen, Audi, Porsche, Lamborghini, Bentley, and Škoda. The group operates an extensive global network of production facilities across Europe, the Americas, Asia, and Africa. Committed to innovation and sustainability, Volkswagen is currently undergoing a significant transformation toward electric mobility and digitalized transportation solutions, aiming to shape the future of global automotive manufacturing and individual mobility for millions of customers worldwide.
